fields.description: When ON: on every Workspace save, the value of 'Evonav Workspace Icon' is copied to the standard 'icon' field and the sidebar cache is cleared so the icon renders immediately.
fields.label: Enable Workspace Icon Sync

fields.description: When ON: navbar items whose visible label matches one of the entries below are hidden.
fields.label: Enable Navbar Hide

fields.default:
About
Help
Frappe Support
Reset Desktop Layout
fields.description: One label per line. Matching is case-insensitive against the visible text of navbar links and dropdown items.
fields.label: Navbar Hide Labels
